creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Yes, for a bit of info on the quarterly branch, see

https://wiki.freebsd.org/PortsSubversionPrimer#Quarterly_Branch

One more thing, we probably should provide a vuxml record for that CVE:

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/book.html#security-notify

I'm short on time, but if you want to venture into that, feel free to add a vuxml diff to this PR and I'll work on it.
